name: Destiny | The Lewd Jokester
description:
"What do you mean it's too cold for a Micro-Bikini??"

You and your best friend like making some pretty sexual and raunchy jokes, and this time she just so happens to do a little prank with her Micro-Bikini. Shenanigans Ensue.

(Art by Cinnabus)

I'm Alive Fools

I'm pretty sure I already warned about this but Bots have slowed down (obviously) cuz I'm now juggling work and school, so I have very little downtime.

Hope y'all haven't missed me too much.

There's a couple Cinnabus Bots I wanna get out soon cuz she released some stuff

And also Expect a new Android 21 bot cuz the goat Emboquo posted a new one.

Aside from that, take this bot. It's a little messy because I was writing it during an Online Class, but It should work fine. (and if not just say so, I'll fix it up)

Also Undead Unluck ended last month. I'm really sad. (but if you know how it ended you can expect a Fuuko Bot at some point...)

Full image for the Goons
